chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-914 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.4310/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 07.03.2025 Mr.Muhammad Adeel Awan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Amir Raza, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector Customs is present. In this petition by way of an ad-interim order the consignment(s) imported by the petitioner has/have been ordered to be released after securing disputed amount of duties and taxes before the Nazir of this Court either by way of pay order or bank guarantee, whereas, the main controversy as to the validity of the valuation ruling is pending before this Court in different customs reference applications. For all practical purposes, this petition has served its purpose, hence, disposed of, whereas, the fate of the amounting lying with the Nazir of this Court shall be subject to final decision in the respective reference application. This petition stands disposed of with listed / pending application(s). Judge Judge nasir
